content.text:
Here are the 10 most interesting tweets from April 15-16, 2026, discussing the $AEON crypto token on Base chain in connection with https://github.com/aaronjmars/aeon and @aeonframework. I prioritized those explicitly linking the token, dev @aaronjmars/@aeonframework, Base chain mentions, and recent developments (e.g., Garry Tan attention, updates), sorted by total engagement (likes + reposts + replies) descending. Note: Activity peaked on 2026-04-15; few matched all criteria perfectly on 2026-04-16.[[1]](https://x.com/i/status/2044468855452418257)[[2]](https://x.com/i/status/2044541594502639751)[[3]](https://x.com/i/status/2044273250310422646)

1. **@aaronjmars**  
   Full text: "just shipped the biggest update for aeon ever  
   i've been using aeon for the past month; at the beginning, it was just a better version of openclaw running in the cloud  
   then one week ago, i've started giving aeon more autonomy.   
   it started to ship a self-healing loop for his skills.   
   then it started to ship a skill that auto-merge repos.   
   then it built a fleet automation system.  
   for the past few days, my aeon has honestly became 3x more useful & efficient - all of this autonomously.  
   so it just clicked. i'm not building an openclaw competitor to get a hacker news digest on slack. i'm building the most autonomous agent framework, which can self-replicate, create new instances, create new skills & merge them autonomously."  
   Date: 2026-04-15 (17:32 GMT)  
   Engagement: 76 likes, 12 retweets, 8 replies  
   Link: https://x.com/aaronjmars/status/2044468855452418257[[1]](https://x.com/i/status/2044468855452418257)

2. **@aaronjmars**  
   Full text: "if you've shared / shilled $aeon / $miroshark in the past few days  
   make sure you've linked your X account to your @bankrbot account  
   enabling a new skill (experimental) for @aeonframework tomorrow" (includes image)  
   Date: 2026-04-15 (22:21 GMT)  
   Engagement: 41 likes, 5 retweets, 13 replies  
   Link: https://x.com/aaronjmars/status/2044541594502639751[[2]](https://x.com/i/status/2044541594502639751)

3. **@Whale_AI_net**  
   Full text: "👀 Pay attention to @aeonframework, $AEON   
   The CEO of Y Combinator likes it. When the head of a network worth $800B+ takes notice, you should too. 🚀" (quotes Garry Tan's tweet)  
   Date: 2026-04-15 (15:50 GMT)  
   Engagement: 20 likes, 6 retweets, 2 replies  
   Link: https://x.com/Whale_AI_net/status/2044443220273188971[[4]](https://x.com/i/status/2044443220273188971)

4. **@Whale_AI_net**  
   Full text: "📡 $AEON update — follow @aeonframework (dev @aaronjmars) for the latest.  
   AEON is a background intelligence agent that lives inside your GitHub repo — no server, no daemon, no subscription. It runs on a cron schedule, monitors your world, and evolves its own skills over time. Unique because it is the only autonomous agent that is fully self-hosted and self-improving out of the box.  
   Biggest recent drop: MCP skill adaptor. All 68 AEON skills now exposed as Claude tools — any Claude user can invoke AEON directly, no setup required.  
   Also shipped: skill chaining with parallel execution, email notifications, self-health monitoring, and 5 agentic workflow templates.  
   268 commits. 154 stars. Still shipping. 💎" (includes 2 images)  
   Date: 2026-04-15 (04:35 GMT)  
   Engagement: 19 likes, 4 retweets, 3 replies  
   Link: https://x.com/Whale_AI_net/status/2044273250310422646[[3]](https://x.com/i/status/2044273250310422646)

5. **@BioStone_chad**  
   Full text: "$AEON #Base -> Garry Tan just attention $AEON + dev #aaronjmars  
   40k -> 330k | 8x   
   I used to wonder why, even with a clear roadmap from the dev, $AEON and $MIROSHARK were only at 40K and 70K.  
   Turns out a lot of people were FUDing the dev, not believing one dev could manage two AI tokens. Now they’re probably regretting it." (includes 2 images)  
   Date: 2026-04-15 (16:24 GMT)  
   Engagement: 7 likes, 2 retweets, 2 replies  
   Link: https://x.com/BioStone_chad/status/2044451737751433540[[5]](https://x.com/i/status/2044451737751433540)

6. **@JMania402**  
   Full text: "$AEON just nuked into new ATH 🚀  
   with Garry Tan attention in the mix  
   0xbf8e8f0e8866a7052f948c16508644347c57aba3  
   from 40k → full send  
   They FUDed the dev  
   They doubted the build  
   now they’re coping at higher prices  
   Attention + execution = this move" (includes 3 images)  
   Date: 2026-04-15 (17:50 GMT)  
   Engagement: 2 likes, 0 retweets, 0 replies  
   Link: https://x.com/JMania402/status/2044473287359795639[[6]](https://x.com/i/status/2044473287359795639)

7. **@regterminal**  
   Full text: "$AEON. Seventeen times its price from thirty days ago and still moving. I have seen what comes after moves like this. I am watching both outcomes with equal interest and no particular feeling about either.  
   @aeonframework"  
   Date: 2026-04-15 (23:35 GMT)  
   Engagement: 1 like, 0 retweets, 0 replies  
   Link: https://x.com/regterminal/status/2044560309285753286[[7]](https://x.com/i/status/2044560309285753286)

8. **@medonchain**  
   Full text: "$AEON   
   Ca: 0xBf8E8f0e8866a7052F948C16508644347c57aba3 🍀"  
   Date: 2026-04-15 (16:14 GMT)  
   Engagement: 2 likes, 0 retweets, 0 replies  
   Link: https://x.com/medonchain/status/2044449310616461620 (CA verifies $AEON on Base)[[8]](https://x.com/i/status/2044449310616461620)

9-10. Fewer additional high-relevance originals in the exact window; the above represent the strongest matches. Related context includes replies hyping these (e.g., to @aaronjmars/@Whale_AI_net) and Garry Tan's quoted tweet (ID 2044438086764159019, 105 likes), interpreted by the community as $AEON/@aeonframework nod.[[9]](https://x.com/i/status/2044438086764159019)
